get.description: Get a single asset by `idOrSlug`. Use `expand` to include related fields such as `addresses`, `chains`, `price`, `market_cap`, and `supply`.

200.description: Price data for the specified asset

get.description: Get price data for a single asset. Returns only the price data with asset identifiers.

200.description: Market cap data for the specified asset

get.description: Get market cap data for a single asset. Returns only the market cap data with asset identifiers.

200.description: Market cap data for the specified asset

get.description: Get market cap data for a single asset. Returns only the market cap data with asset identifiers.

200.description: Markets data for the specified asset

get.description: Get markets data for a single asset. Returns only the markets data with asset identifiers.

200.description: OHLCV data for the specified asset

get.description: Get OHLCV (Open, High, Low, Close, Volume) data for the last 24 hours for a single asset. Returns only the OHLCV data with asset identifiers.

200.description: Sector data for the specified asset

get.description: Get sector data for a single asset. Returns only the sector data with asset identifiers.

200.description: Supply data for the specified asset

get.description: Get supply data for a single asset. Returns only the supply data with asset identifiers.
List assets with pagination and optional filters (`code`, `slug`, `category`, etc.). Use `expand` to include related fields (e.g., `price`, `markets`, `supply`).
Retrieve a single glossary term by `idOrSlug`.
List glossary terms with pagination and optional filters.

Returns a paginated list of Blockworks’ computed market-level statistics. Use this endpoint to discover available stats and build market overviews and dashboards. Each item includes a stat key, value, effective time window, and metadata.
Retrieves a single market-level statistic by ID, including its value, effective time window, and metadata. Use with the list endpoint for discovery or to fetch the latest value for a specific stat.
Retrieves detailed transparency framework score for a specific project including ratings across four key categories.

404.description: Report not found or PDF not available

get.description: Downloads the complete token transparency framework report as a PDF file.
Returns a paginated list of token transparency framework reports with scores across four key categories.
List available metrics with optional filters `project` and `identifier`. Supports pagination via `page` and `limit`.
